selectionPolicy.description: All active markets are evaluated, but only the six configured core markets may become the final selection.

selected.marketName: Home Team to Lead at Any Time

selectionRule: 2 markets were within 3 points; the wider/safer qualified market was selected.

alternatives.marketName: Home Team to Win Either Half

allMarkets.marketName: Home Team to Lead at Any Time
Home Team to Win Either Half

hardFailures: League first-half goal rate is below 68%.
Selected team scores three or more above 18%.
Selected team scoring average is above 1.65.

allMarkets.marketName: Home Team to Score in Both Halves

hardFailures: Selected team scores two or more above 28%.
Selected team scoring average is above 1.20.
Opponent concedes two or more above 28%.
Selected team scores two or more in at least 40%.
Opponent concedes two or more in at least 38%.
Selected team scoring average is above 0.85.
Selected team scores in at least 72%.
Selected team has a strong late-scoring profile.
Selected team scores three or more below 25%.
Opponent concedes three or more below 22%.
Opponent concedes three or more below 15%.

contradictions: At least one defence concedes two or more above 45%.

hardFailures: Selected team clean-sheet rate is below 36%.
Selected team concedes above 1.00 per match.
Selected defence concedes in at least 75%.
contradictions: Opponent has a strong late-scoring record.

hardFailures: At least one team scores two or more too frequently.
Both failed-to-score rates must be at least 35%.
Both scoring averages must be at most 0.95.
Both xG averages must be at most 1.00.
At least one team scores in 75% or more.
At least one defence concedes in 75% or more.

contradictions: Neither team produces two first-half goals often enough.

hardFailures: Selected team win rate is below 52%.
Selected team clean-sheet rate is below 36%.
Selected team xG edge is below 0.55.
Selected team concedes in at least 70%.
Away PPG is below home PPG.
Away scored-first rate is below home rate.
Home win rate is too strong.
contradictions: Away recent venue loss rate exceeds 34%.

hardFailures: Home win profile is too strong.
Neither balanced scoring nor dominant-team route qualifies.
Goal projection depends too heavily on one team.
X/1 plus X/2 HT/FT is below 28%.
Selected team scoring rate is below 76%.
Selected team scoring average is below 1.
Selected team scoring average is below 0.90.
contradictions: Opponent xGA is low for this team-total line.

hardFailures: At least one team wins above 48%.
At least one team wins above 55%.
First-score edge is too large for a draw.
Selected team scores two or more below 42%.
Selected team scoring average is below 1.55.
Opponent concedes two or more below 35%.
Selected team two-goal rate is below 35%.
Opponent concedes two or more below 25%.
contradictions: Opponent xGA is low for this team-total line.

hardFailures: At least one failed-to-score rate is above 30%.
At least one clean-sheet rate is above 32%.
At least one team fails to score above 38%.
At least one team keeps clean sheets above 45%.

allMarkets.marketName: Away Team to Lead at Any Time
hardFailures: Selected team scoring rate is below 78%.
Selected team scoring average is below 1.15.
Neither first-score route nor comeback route qualifies.
Opponent trails at some point below 58%.
Selected team scoring rate is below 72%.
Selected team rarely scores first and rarely completes comebacks.
Selected team scores three or more below 25%.
Selected team scoring average is below 2.00.
Selected team scores two or more below 55%.
Opponent concedes three or more below 22%.
Opponent concedes two or more below 45%.
Selected team three-goal rate is below 18%.
Opponent concedes three or more below 15%.
Three-goal rate is driven by at most one relevant match.
contradictions: Opponent xGA is low for this team-total line.

allMarkets.marketName: Away Team to Win Either Half
hardFailures: Selected team wins either half below 60%.
contradictions: Selected team recent either-half win rate is below 50%.

hardFailures: 2/2 plus X/2 HT/FT rate is below 42%.
contradictions: Away lacks both two-goal power and clean-sheet protection.

allMarkets.marketName: Away Team to Score in Both Halves
hardFailures: Selected team scores in both halves below 30%.
Selected team scores two or more below 50%.
Selected team scoring average is below 1.85.
Opponent concedes in both halves below 27%.
Opponent concedes two or more below 42%.
Selected team scoring is too concentrated in one half.
Neither team scores three or more in at least 25%.
Neither defence concedes three or more in at least 22%.
At least one team has Under 3.5 above 80%.
Weak secondary attack and insufficient three-goal strength.
